mapper.select: SELECT device_id AS deviceId, member_id AS memberId, group_id AS groupId, device_name AS deviceName, location, capacity_kw AS capacityKw, device_type AS deviceType, status, install_date AS installDate, latitude, longitude, nx, ny, is_main AS isMain FROM ess_device WHERE nx IS NOT NULL AND ny IS NOT NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO weather_data ( device_id, fcst_date, fcst_time, sky_status, rain_type, rain_prob, temperature, humidity, wind_speed, solar_radiation, ess_status ) VALUES ( #{deviceId}, #{fcstDate}, #{fcstTime}, #{skyStatus}, #{rainType}, #{rainProb}, #{temperature}, #{humidity}, #{windSpeed}, #{solarRadiation}, #{essStatus} )
mapper.select: SELECT weather_id AS weatherId, device_id AS deviceId, fcst_date AS fcstDate, fcst_time AS fcstTime, sky_status AS skyStatus, rain_type AS rainType, rain_prob AS rainProb, temperature, humidity, wind_speed AS windSpeed, solar_radiation AS solarRadiation, ess_status AS essStatus FROM weather_data WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} ORDER BY fcst_date DESC, fcst_time DESC, created_at DESC LIMIT 1
